word: H5963 - עַלְמֹן דִּבְלָתָיְמָה - ʻAlmôn Diblâthâyᵉmâh - al-mone' dib-lawthaw'-yem-aw - Almondilathaim

sections.paragraph:
עלמן דּבלתימה - ‛almôn diblâthâymâh - al-mone' dib-law-thaw'-yem-aw

From the same as H5960 and the dual of H1690 (compare H1015) with enclitic of direction; Almon towards Diblathajim; Almon Diblathajemah, a place in Moab: - Almon-diblathaim.
